items.markdown:
Cab services from Bangalore to Mysore are readily available for the ~150 km trip, usually taking 3-4 hours. `Rates start around ₹1,500-₹2,000 for hatchbacks/sedans and ₹3,000-₹4,500+ for SUVs (Innova/Ertiga)` . Key options include Savaari, MakeMyTrip, and Uber Intercity, with options for one-way or round-trip bookings.[[1]](https://www.uber.com/in/en/r/intercity/bangalore-karnataka-to-mysore-karnataka/)[[2]](https://www.goibibo.com/cars/indica-car-from-bangalore-to-mysore/)[[3]](https://taxibazaar.in/taxi-rental-bangalore-to-mysore.php)[[4]](https://www.makemytrip.com/car-rental/bangalore-mysore-cab-services.html)[[5]](https://www.savaari.com/bangalore/bangalore-to-mysore-cabs)

**Top Cab Options & Estimated Fares (One-Way):** 

- **Hatchback/Sedan (Dzire, Etios, Indica):** ~₹1,500 - ₹2,500.
- **SUV (Innova, Ertiga, Xylo):** ~₹2,500 - ₹4,800+.
- **Tempo Traveller:** ~₹4,999+.[[1]](https://www.uber.com/in/en/r/intercity/bangalore-karnataka-to-mysore-karnataka/)[[2]](https://www.yatra.com/outstation-cabs/bangalore-to-mysore)[[3]](https://taxibazaar.in/taxi-rental-bangalore-to-mysore.php)[[4]](https://www.goibibo.com/cars/indica-car-from-bangalore-to-mysore/)[[5]](https://www.deepamcabs.com/bangalore/outstation-car-rental/bangalore-to-mysore-cabs-services)

**Key Considerations:** 

- **Average Trip Time:** 3 - 4 hours.
- **Distance Covered:** ~150 - 160 kms.
- **Tolls/Parking:** Typically extra.
- **Booking Options:** [[MakeMyTrip](https://www.google.com/search?q=MakeMyTrip&csui=3&hl=en&gl=IN&uule=w+CAIQICIFSW5kaWE&ved=2ahUKEwimiYCiz6iUAxXx9bsIHSRSMh0QgK4QegYIAQgBEAY) ](https://www.makemytrip.com/car-rental/bangalore-mysore-cab-services.html), [[Savaari](https://www.google.com/search?q=Savaari&csui=3&hl=en&gl=IN&uule=w+CAIQICIFSW5kaWE&ved=2ahUKEwimiYCiz6iUAxXx9bsIHSRSMh0QgK4QegYIAQgBEAg) ](https://www.savaari.com/bangalore/bangalore-to-mysore-cabs), [[Uber
